Rules.HelpTitle: 📖 Fate Scroll: The Great Encyclopedia of Kuboker
Rules.HelpHtml:
STYLES AND RULES

1. DEGREES OF SUCCESS

FAIR (Society / Diplomacy / Games Lore):
• 🌟 Nat 20 Uber: you are in perfect form. Gain 2 rerolls and 1 crown reroll for the stock. The crown reroll must be used first.
• 🎯 Critical Success: masterful play. Reroll 2 dice.
• ✅ Success: steady play. Reroll 1 die.
• ❌ Failure: luck slips away. No rerolls.
• ⚠️ Critical Failure: the dealer rerolls one of your dice for you.
• 💀 Nat 1 Uber: you gain a Black Die (0).

CHEAT (Thievery / Deception / Games Lore):
• 🌟 Nat 20 Uber: master of shadows. Set any faces for 2 dice. Only Uber-Observe notices this level.
• 🎯 Critical Success: sleight of hand. Set the face of 1 die. Only Crit-Observe notices this level.
• ✅ Success: subtle cheating. Reroll 1 die. Only Uber-Observe notices it.
• ❌ Failure: the trick fails. No rerolls. Crit-Observe can notice it.
• ⚠️ Critical Failure: everyone notices you, except critically failed observers.
• 💀 Nat 1 Uber: disgrace. absolutely everyone notices.

OBSERVE (Perception / Intimidation / Games Lore):
• Successful Observe checks raise the DC for cheaters: +2 for the first success, +1 for each additional one.
• 🌟 Nat 20 Uber: reroll 1 die and notice cheating up to the Success tier.
• 🎯 Critical Success: reroll 1 die and notice cheating up to the Failure tier.
• ✅ Success: reroll 1 die and notice cheating up to the Critical Failure tier.
• 💀 Nat 1 Uber: gain a hidden Black Die.

2. HANDS (D10)

  1. KUBOKER: 5 matching dice (for example 8-8-8-8-8).
  2. Four of a Kind: 4 matching dice (for example 5-5-5-5).
  3. Full House: three of one value and two of another.
  4. Straight: five consecutive values (for example 1-2-3-4-5 or 6-7-8-9-10).
  5. Three of a Kind: 3 matching dice.
  6. Two Pairs: two pairs of different values.
  7. Pair: 2 matching dice.
  8. High Die: if there is no combination, highest values decide.

Empty.JoinInstructions: Players mark "I'm in the game", then the GM clicks Start.
Empty.NoParticipants: There are no participants. Return to setup and mark players as participating.

HandsSummary.FourOfAKind: Four dice show the same value.
HandsSummary.FullHouse: Three of one value and two of another.

UberCrit.Label: Miracle
UberCrit.Style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,223,122,0.26), rgba(56,98,34,0.20)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,223,122,0.55);
